purpose: MiniViktor regression cases that must pass before calendar integration.
hardRule: Context-based inference is allowed. Hidden inference is not allowed.

cases.name: visible AM/PM inference gate for earlier reminders
turns: Earlier reminder, today at 7 n tmrw at 5
cases.expected: Ask for visible AM/PM inference confirmation before save options.

cases.name: candidate correction keeps two reminders
turns: No, 1st reminder today at 3 and 2nd reminder tomorrow at 7
cases.expected: Event tomorrow 8 PM; reminders today 3 PM and tomorrow 7 PM; visible inference confirmation.

cases.name: multi-time same-day reminders before event
cases.expected: Event today 8 PM; reminders today 3 PM and 7 PM; visible inference confirmation.

cases.name: event time preserved with later reminder time
turns: tomorrow however need a reminder at 4
cases.expected: Event tomorrow 6 PM; reminder tomorrow 4 PM; visible inference confirmation if AM/PM was inferred.

latestFix: Event/Reminder Regression Repair: event date preservation, before-event offsets, lunch event + multiple alert parsing.
